properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: East went looking for west, but never found him, Guilt went looking for my past, but only found love, I heard about a sea where sin sinks like stones, There's no floor there just mercy down below.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There's so much grace, There's so much grace.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I heard about a Man with holes in his hands, He can hide mountains of sin in them, His smile destroyed my religion, His love shakes down my prison.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I could run for all my days But I'd never run away There's no mistake I could make That could ever make You change

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: There's so much grace There's so much grace In the arms of the Father There's so much grace (There's so much grace) There's so much grace (There's so much grace) There's so much grace, (So much grace) There's so much grace (So much grace) There's so much grace

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Wave after wave, All this grace, Washes over me, Washes over me, So much grace.
